![Profile Views](https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=RememberIOm&label=Profile%20views&color=ffbf00&style=for-the-badge)

🎓 Graduate student at [**FCAI Lab**](https://github.com/FCAI-Lab), Yonsei University  
🔬 Researching **AI Model Decomposition & Verification**

[![FCAI Lab](https://img.shields.io/badge/Lab-FCAI%20Lab-003876?style=for-the-badge)](https://sites.google.com/view/fcai-lab)
[![Yonsei](https://img.shields.io/badge/Yonsei%20University-003876?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.yonsei.ac.kr/en_sc/)
[![Email](https://img.shields.io/badge/rememberiom@yonsei.ac.kr-EA4335?style=for-the-badge&logo=gmail&logoColor=white)](mailto:rememberiom@yonsei.ac.kr)

---

### 📄 Publications

<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07868">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/arXiv-2604.07868-b31b1b?style=for-the-badge&logo=arxiv&logoColor=white" alt="arXiv" />
</a>

**On the Decompositionality of Neural Networks** &nbsp;·&nbsp; *arXiv preprint, 2026*
<br/>
<sub><b><ins>Junyong Lee</ins></b>, Baek-Ryun Seong, Sang-Ki Ko, Andrew Ferraiuolo, Minwoo Kang, Hyuntae Jeon, Seungmin Lim, Jieung Kim</sub>
<br/>
<sub>Introduces <i>neural decompositionality</i>, a formal semantic-preserving abstraction over neural architectures, and proposes <b>SAVED</b> — a boundary-aware framework for verification-driven decomposition.</sub>

---
